---
name: Feedback
about: Provide bounded feedback on ECL documentation, replay behavior, or trace mapping.
title: "[feedback] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ""
---

## Feedback Type

- [ ] documentation clarity
- [ ] demo reproducibility
- [ ] trace mapping behavior
- [ ] replay output
- [ ] citation / archive metadata

## Context

Describe the page, command, or file you reviewed.

## Observation

What did you observe?

## Expected Clarification

What would make the artifact easier to understand or reproduce?

## Boundary

Do not include private traces, credentials, personal data, or production logs.
